ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hardware_inventory" (
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each hardware component */,
  "ethernet_interfaces" INTEGER /* Number of 10/100/1000 Ethernet interfaces available on the device */,
  "uplink_interfaces" TEXT /* Details of uplink interfaces */,
  "software_feature_set" TEXT /* Cisco IOS Software feature set available for the device */,
  "available_poe_power" TEXT /* Available PoE power for the device */,
  "second_fru_power_supply" TEXT /* Alternative power supply option for the hardware component */,
  "flexstack_option" TEXT /* FlexStack configuration options available for the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the hardware */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the hardware */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each hardware unit */,
  "warranty_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the warranty */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the warranty */,
  "physical_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the hardware */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the hardware was purchased */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the hardware for better searchability */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of units in stock */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the hardware (e.g., active, inactive, in maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, network engineer, procurement staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the hardware being modified */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., add, update, deactivate) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the change made */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who approved the change (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES hardware_inventory ("part_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the hardware maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintenance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintenance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES hardware_inventory ("part_number")
)
